name: HRT_PERSON_TALENT_SCORES_V
query: SELECT HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.PROFILE_ITEM_ID PROFILE_ITEM_ID, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.PROFILE_ID PROFILE_ID, HRT_PROFILES_B.PERSON_ID PERSON_ID, HRT_PROFILES_B.PARTY_ID PARTY_ID, HRT_PROFILES_B.PROFILE_TYPE_ID PROFILE_TYPE_ID, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.CONTENT_TYPE_ID CONTENT_TYPE_ID, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.DATE_FROM DATE_FROM, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.DATE_TO DATE_TO, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.QUALIFIER_ID1 QUALIFIER_ID1, HRT_QUALIFIERS_B.QUALIFIER_CODE QUALIFIER_CODE, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.SOURCE_TYPE SOURCE_TYPE, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.SOURCE_KEY1 SOURCE_KEY1, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.RATING_MODEL_ID1 RATING_MODEL_ID, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.RATING_LEVEL_ID1 RATING_LEVEL_ID, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.ITEM_TEXT2000_1 OVERALL_COMMENTS, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS, HRT_PROFILES_B, HRT_QUALIFIERS_B, HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B WHERE HRT_PROFILES_B.PROFILE_ID = HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.PROFILE_ID AND HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.CONTENT_TYPE_ID = HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B.CONTENT_TYPE_ID AND HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B.CONTEXT_NAME = 'TALENT_SCORE' AND HRT_PROFILES_B.PROFILE_USAGE_CODE = 'P' AND HRT_QUALIFIERS_B.QUALIFIER_ID=HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS.QUALIFIER_ID1 AND HRT_QUALIFIERS_B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID=HRT_PROFILES_B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
